perturbation.original_text: 12. Any dispute arising out of the execution of this Agreement, which cannot be negotiated and settled by both Parties, shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the People's Court where this Agreement is signed.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. In the event the vehicle space insufficiency which causes Party A's need unable to be satisfied nor can it be adjusted to satisfy Party A's need, Party A can terminate this Agreement without any compensation. 9. Party A has the right to terminate this Agreement if Party B has breached the above articles in this Agreement. The termination of this Agreement shall not prejudice Party A's right to hold Party B responsible for breach of contract. 10. Party B shall obtain Party A's written consent in the case the early termination of the Agreement. Party B shall pay one-month freight as liquidated damages in case of termination of the Agreement without consent. Within the contract period, Party B shall not charge the freight difference if Party A rents same-level vehicles. Party B shall also compensate Party A's other losses. 11. Without Party A's approval, Party B shall not transfer the carriage of goods to any third party in the designated route. Otherwise, Party A has the right to terminate this Agreement directly. 12. Any dispute arising out of the execution of this Agreement, which cannot be negotiated and settled by both Parties, shall be subject to the final interpretation by Party A. Any dispute arising out of the execution of this Agreement, which cannot be negotiated and settled by both Parties, shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the People's Court where this Agreement is signed.
perturbation.explanation: The clause specifying the jurisdiction for dispute resolution is moved to a section dealing with contract termination, obscuring its relevance and making it harder for a party to find when a dispute arises. Furthermore, its relocation adjacent to the clause about Party A's final interpretation authority could imply that Party A's interpretation supersedes the jurisdiction clause, adding ambiguity.
perturbation.contradicted_law: Choice of Law and Forum Selection Clause Enforcement
perturbation.law_explanation: Article 128 of the Contract Law of the People's Republic of China stipulates that disputes can be settled through negotiation or mediation; if that fails, parties can apply for arbitration or file a lawsuit. While this agreement includes the possibility of going to the People's court, relocating the dispute resolution clause within termination conditions and right of interpretation obscures the process of dispute resolution, especially given that final interpretation is subject to Party A, which is in contravention of the general intent for fairness and clarity in dispute resolution. It might allow Party A to dominate the final decision.

Home User Management About Us Chinese lawinfochina.com > Laws & Regulations > Text Bookmark Download Print Search: "Fabao" Window Font Size: Regulations of Shanghai Municipality of Environmental Protection [Revised] 上海市环境保护条例 [已被修订] 【法宝引证码】 Issuing authority： Local People's Congresses (incl. Standing Committees) and Governments at Various Levels , Shanghai Municipality , Shanghai Municipality People's Congress (incl. Standing Committee) Date issued： 12-08-1994 Effective date: 05-01-1995 Level of Authority: Provincial Local Regulations Area of Law: Environmental Protection Revised by： Decision of the Standing Committee of the People's Congress of Shanghai Municipality to Amend the Regulations of Shanghai Municipality on Environmental Protection (1997) (Issued on 05-27-1997 Effective on 07-01-1997) REGULATIONS OF SHANGHAI MUNICIPALITY OF ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION (Adopted by 14th Session of Standing Committee of 10th People's Congress of Shanghai Municipality on December 8, 1994, and to be put into effect as of May 1, 1995.) 上海市环境保护条例 （１９９４年１２月８日上海市第十届人民代表大会常务委员会第十四次会议通过，１９９５年５月１日起施行） CHAPTER 1 GENERAL PROVISIONS 第一章 总则 Article 1 To cater to the country's basic policy of environmental protection these Regulations are promulgated for the protection and improvement of biological and ecological environment and prevention of environmental and other pollution to protect people's health, and coordinate environmental protection with economic construction and social development, according to the Environmental Protection Law of the People's Republic of China and other laws and regulations, as well as the actual conditions of Shanghai Municipality. 第一条 环境保护是我国基本国策。为了保护和改善生活环境和生态环境，防治污染和其他公害，保障人身健康，促进环境保护与经济建设、社会发展相协调，根据《 中华人民共和国环境保护法 》和有关法律、法规，结合本市实际情况，制定本条例。 Article 2 "Environment" mentioned in these Regulations means the sum total of all kinds of natural and man-made factors that have an impact on human existence and development, including atmosphere, water, ocean, land, mineral resources, forests, grasslands, wildlife, natural remains, human relics, natural reserves, scenic spots and historical sites, cities, and villages. 第二条 本条例所称环境，是指影响人类生态、发展的各种天然的和经过人工改造的自然因素的总体，包括大气、水、海洋、土地、矿藏、森林、草原、野生生物、自然遗迹、人文遗迹、自然保护区、风景名胜区、城市和乡村等。 Article 3 These Regulations apply to administrative divisions of Shanghai Municipality. 第三条 本条例适用于本市行政区域。 Article 4 Principles governing Shanghai's environmental protection work: 第四条 本市环境保护工作的原则： (1) Putting prevention first, combining prevention with treatment, adopting comprehensive treatment; （一）预防为主、防治结合、综合治理； (2) Integrating the utilization and protection of natural resources; （二）资源利用与保护相结合； (3) Polluters shall bear responsibility for treatment and compensation for the damage; （三）污染者承担治理和损害补偿责任； (4) A combination of unified supervision and diverse management; （四）统一监督管理与分工负责相结合； (5) Integrating specialized management with public participation. （五）专业管理与公众参与相结合。 Article 5 People's governments at all levels and their departments and units should make great efforts to promote education in, popularize scientific knowledge about and enhance the supervision of public opinion over environmental protection, and strength the consciousness of people on environmental protection and the related legal matters. 第五条 各级人民政府及其部门、各单位应当重视环境保护宣传教育，普及环境保护科学知识，加强环境保护舆论监督，提高公众的环境意识和法制观念。 Article 6 Citizens have the right to enjoy and the duty to protect a fine environment. Any unit or person has the right to inform against or sue those who pollute or damage the environment. 第六条 公民有享受良好环境的权利，有保护环境的义务。一切单位和个人对污染、破坏环境的行为有检举、控告的权利。 Article 7 The municipal, district and county people's governments should praise or award those units and persons that have achieved outstanding success in protecting and improving the environment and in enforcing these Regulations. 第七条 市和区、县人民政府应当
perturbation.justification: The relocation of the dispute resolution clause, combined with granting Party A the authority of final interpretation, creates a structural flaw that contradicts the intent of fair dispute resolution as suggested by the Law Explanation. While Scraped Law Snippet 2 does not directly pertain to contract law, the Law Explanation suggests that the change obscures the dispute resolution process and potentially allows Party A to dominate decisions, undermining fairness and clarity. The change introduces ambiguity around the jurisdiction clause, making it difficult to enforce impartially, which is a structural flaw leading to a legal contradiction.
